name: Suthep Hill House
note: 2BR seen ~฿12k. Building-managed; walk in and ask the front office for vacant units — they hold the keys and owner contacts.

name: JJ Hometown
note: 2BR ~฿12.5k seen. On-site management; ask at the office.

name: Chom Doi House (round tower)
note: 2BR ~฿14k seen. Distinctive round tower on the Canal Rd / Suthep side; ask reception.

name: Chom Doi Condominium
note: ~12-storey condo with mountain views, 2BR ~฿16k seen. Juristic office on the ground floor keeps a list of owners renting out.

name: North 4 Condominium
note: 2BR ~฿16k seen (BaanFinder). Ask the juristic office for vacant/owner-rented units.

name: OnePlus Business Park 1
note: 2BR ~฿18.5k seen. One of several 'One Plus' projects on this side of town.

name: The Star Hill Condo
note: Seen on Thailand-Property (units ran >฿20k there, but the building has turnover — worth asking the juristic for cheaper owner deals).

name: One Plus Nineteen (3 & 4)
note: 2BR ~฿15k seen. Corner units, mountain views. Slightly south toward the airport.

name: Hillside Condominium 1–4
area: Huay Kaew Road (walk to CMU front gate, Nimman, Maya)
note: Well-known cluster of large condos on Huay Kaew with constant rental turnover and on-site juristic offices — arguably the best single walk-in near CMU. Verify on the ground (not from this scrape).

name: Punna Residence (Nimman / Oasis)
note: Popular with students/staff near CMU/Nimman; multiple Punna projects. General knowledge — verify the specific building and office on site.

name: My Hip Condo
note: 2BR ~฿18k seen. Ask the juristic office; close to Nimman/CMU.

name: Rooks Condotel
note: 2BR 66 sqm ~฿15k seen. Has a management desk.

name: Escent Chiang Mai / Escent Park Ville
note: 2BR ~฿19k seen. Further from CMU (east), but large with lots of rentals — easy to walk in and ask.

name: D Condo Nim
area: Nim City, east (near Central Festival — NOT Nimman)
note: 2BR ~฿20k seen. Name says 'Nim' but it's the east side, not Nimmanhaemin.
